name: claude-usage-monitor
description: Shows your Claude Pro/Max quota usage in the status bar — 5-hour and 7-day rolling windows as live progress bars with reset countdown. Requires Claude Code CLI to be installed and authenticated.

claudeUsage.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: How often to refresh usage data (seconds)

claudeUsage.defaultMode.description: Which limit to show in status bar: 5h window, 7d window, or both

claudeUsage.credentialsPath.description: Override path to .credentials.json (leave empty for auto-detect)
